title: Scenario
description: A synthesized teaching trajectory (e.g., ORRERY-1 free-return). Distinct from historical missions in static/data/missions/ — scenarios are educational constructs, never appear in the mission library, and exist only to be flown via /fly?mission=[id].

id.description: Lowercase URL slug. Used as the scenario filename and the ?mission= URL param.

dep_day.description: Departure simulation-day, anchored to the prototype's epoch reference (Earth dep at day 333).

dv_total_km_s.description: Total ∆v budget for the mission, km/s.

dv_used_km_s.description: ∆v consumed by burns. Must not exceed dv_total_km_s.
